summary: The implementation adds a new AttackOnTitanGallery component and integrates it into ProductBrowse page with swipe gestures and a 'Look Out' button linking to the Meesho affiliate URL. However, the actual product image files are not included in the diff, and the stacked layout requirement is not clearly implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the two uploaded product images (ms_qjphs_512_418433256.jpg and ms_cblw2_512_418433257.jpg) to the app as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows references to these image paths in code but does not include evidence that the actual image files were added to the filesystem

missing_requirements.requirement: Photos displayed with one appearing below the other in a stacked layout
missing_requirements.reason: The implementation shows a single image with navigation arrows and indicators, but does not show evidence of a stacked vertical arrangement where both photos are visible simultaneously with one below the other

hallucinated_features.description: Navigation arrows (ChevronLeft, ChevronRight) for image navigation
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies swipe gestures for navigation but does not mention arrow buttons or click-based navigation controls

hallucinated_features.description: Image counter display showing current position (e.g., '1 / 2')
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest mentions visual feedback for active photo but does not specify a numeric counter overlay
The BuildRequest does not mention thumbnail indicators or dots for navigation
